decoder.name: sangfor-ngaf
decoder.regex: devid=(\S+) src=(\S+) dst=(\S+) actions=(\S+) attack_type="([^"]+)" policy="([^"]+)" type=(\S+) severity=(\S+)
decoder.order: devid, srcip, dstip, actions, attack_type, policy, type, severity

decoder.name: waf
decoder.regex: ^WAF-\S+ src=(\S+) dst=(\S+) actions=(\S+) attack_type="([^"]+)" rule=(\S+) method=(\S+) uri=(\S+) waf_status=(\d+)
decoder.order: srcip, dstip, actions, attack_type, rule, method, uri, waf_status
